info.title: The Starter
info.lead: Would you like to try the power of nordic gold first? «The Starter» is your entry into the AmberNord world. Every bottle is obtained from hand-picked berries of our exclusive Zelt Selection and protects your body from oxidative stress with 9× the Vitamin C of a lemon.
info.advantageBody: With this first order you receive a 10 CHF voucher for your next purchase (promo until 01.05.). We are certain: once you experience the first natural focus boost without heart flutter, the ritual will become a permanent part of your daily life.
info.scienceItem1: Cellular protection: an extremely high natural Vitamin C content neutralises oxidative stress.
info.scienceItem2: Omega-7: this rare, valuable fatty acid harmonises the micro-environment and nourishes mucous membranes.
info.scienceItem3: Yields up to 3 litres of vitalising premium drink.
info.scienceItem4: Absolute purity: no added sugar, no artificial flavours. 100% nature.
info.shippingText: Reliable premium shipping within Switzerland (excl. shipping costs). Direct shipping from our logistics centre in Aarau.
